# GYEON - Q²M Tire Cleaner

Rating: 9/10 (32 reviews)

GYEON Q²M Tire Cleaner strips old dressings, browning and road grime from tyres and rubber. Foams well, clings, and rinses clean — perfect prep before fresh tyre dressing or coating.

From £9.50 (Ex VAT: £7.92)

Brand: GYEON

## Available Sizes & Pricing

| Size | Stock | Price (inc. VAT) | Price (ex. VAT) |
|------|-------|-------------------|------------------|
| 500ml | 20+ | £9.50 | £7.92 |
| 1 Litre | 17 | £15.00 | £12.50 |
| 4 Litre | 5 | £41.00 | £34.17 |

## Product Images

- Gyeon-tire-cleaner-b-756x698h.webp
- Gyeon-tire-cleaner-c-756x698h.webp
- Gyeon-tire-cleaner-a-756x698h.webp
- gyeon-tire-500mla-756x698h.webp
- 500-tire-cleaner-3000-756x698h.webp
- gyeon-tire-cleaner-4l-756x698h.webp

## Description

Restore that fresh, deep black look. GYEON Q²M Tire Cleaner is a dedicated rubber cleaner that breaks down old dressings, silicone residue and embedded road grime to leave sidewalls perfectly clean. Its high-foaming formula clings to the surface for longer work time, lifting contamination so it rinses away clean without leaving a film. Safe on rubber, factory finishes and most wheels (avoid bare/polished aluminium), it's the ideal prep step before applying a tyre dressing or tyre coating for better bonding and longer durability.

Gyeon Q²M TireCleaner is a unique formula designed to cleanse all rubber elements of your car. It will soak deep in the porous structure of the material and loosen accumulated dirt and contamination. Gyeon Q²M Tire Cleaner dissolves tyre dressings and prepares the surface prior to dressing with Gyeon Tire or Gyeon Tyre Express Dressings.

Gyeon Q²M Tire Cleaner is completely safe on ceramic coated rims, not interfering with the protective layer or reducing its hydrophobicity. It might be used as a regular, daily wheel cleaner as well.

## How to use

1. Rinse tyres to remove loose dirt.
2. Spray Q²M Tire Cleaner liberally and agitate with a tyre brush.
3. Rinse thoroughly until runoff is clear.
4. Dry and apply your preferred tyre dressing/coating.

## Pro tips

- For heavy browning, repeat until foam stays white.
- Clean tyres before washing paint to avoid splatter contamination.
- Pair with a tyre scrub brush and finish with a satin or glossy dressing to taste.

## Specifications

- CONSUMPTION: 20ml / tire
- COATING SAFE: YES
- PH LEVEL: 10

Available in 500ml, 1 Litre & 4 Litre Bottles

## Product Information

- Dissolves old tire dressing build ups
- Safely and easily remove dirt, grime and old dressings
- Consumption of 20ml per tire
- Won't strip wheel coatings

## Product Description

The Gyeon Tire Cleaner helps you easily remove dirt, grime and old dressings on your tires! Dirty tires can be a real eyesore, especially if the rest of your paint looks like a mirror. Before you can dress the tires to add that deep, dark, contrast we all strive for, you will have to remove the dirt and grime on the surface. The unique formula was designed to help cleanse your tires and other rubber around your vehicle. Tire Cleaner will soak deep into the porous structure of the material and loosen accumulated dirt, road grime, oils, etc. It will also dissolve old tire dressings layers and helps prepare the surface prior to new dressing applications (i.e. Gyeon Tire Express). Gyeon notes that the Tire Cleaner is safe on ceramic coated rims, not interfering with the protective layer or reducing its hydrophobicity. This allows it to be used as a regular or daily wheel cleaner if desired.

TIP: Spray generously on a wet tire and agitate with a medium to stiff brush. Let dwell and rinse with a pressure washer. Continue until all suds are white.

Manufacturer Estimates Consumption: 20ml per tire
Coating Safe: Yes
PH Level: 10

## Professional Detailer Reviews

For car enthusiasts and detailers seeking the ultimate clean for their tires, the Gyeon Tire Cleaner stands out as a premier product. This specialized cleaner is designed to tackle the toughest grime and build-up, delivering impressive results that elevate your vehicle's overall appearance.

Review article: "Tested: Gyeon Tire Cleaner Review" by Reece @ DI

## From The Label

### Product Description

Black tyre back. Deep cleanse for all types of tyres. Removes dirt, old dressings and prepares the tyre for coating.

- Removes dirt and contamination
- Strong and effective
- Safe on all types of rubber

### Directions

Rinse the wheel well. Spray a moderate amount of Q2M TireCleaner on the tyre surface. Agitate with Q2M TireBrush. Let dwell. Do not let dry on the surface. Rinse with a pressure washer. Never work in direct sunlight. Work in a well-ventilated area. KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN.

## White Wall Cleaner

Q²M TireCleaner is a specialized and highly effective tire and rubber cleaner. It removes old dressings, browning, and deep, accumulated contamination with ease. Q²M TireCleaner is safe on all types of tires, including classic white-wall rubber.

## Dissolves Old Dressings

Q²M Tire Express provides a very deep, natural, and matte visual effect. It builds a repellent, self-cleaning layer that helps to keep the tire clean and will not diminish even during a long drive in rainy conditions.

## Rubber Cleaner For All

Q²M TireCleaner is versatile and can be used not only on tires but also on floor mats, plastic trims, and door seals. It is safe on ceramic coatings, and for effective use, you can spray it generously on a wet tire, agitate with a brush, let it dwell, and then rinse with a pressure washer. A second cleaning can be done to check if suds are white, indicating thorough cleaning.

## Specifications

- CONSUMPTION: 20ml / tire
- COATING SAFE: YES
- PH LEVEL: 10

## Description

### Superb maintenance products for outstanding detailing performance

A specialised and highly effective tyre and rubber cleaner. Removes old dressings and deep, accumulated contamination with ease. Q²M TireCleaner is safe on all types of tyres, including classic white-wall rubber.

### Best Practice and Pro-Tips from Yves Heylen

The ultimate solution for tyre and rubber cleaning. Q²M Tire Cleaner is able to remove old dressing and accumulated dirt even out of the structure of the tyre. It prepares the surface for every quality dressing. TIP: spray generously on a wet tyre and agitate with a medium to stiff brush. Let dwell and rinse with a pressure washer. Do a second clean to check if suds are white.

CONSUMPTION: 20ml / tire
COATING SAFE: YES
PH LEVEL: 10

### Safe On Coated Rims

Q²M TireCleaner is completely safe on ceramic coated rims, not interfering with the protective layer or reducing its hydrophobicity. It might be used as a regular, daily wheel cleaner as well.

### Effective Tyre and Rubber Cleaner

Q²M Tire Cleaner is a unique formula designed to cleanse all rubber elements of your car. It will soak deep in the porous structure of the material and loosen accumulated dirt and contamination. Q²M TireCleaner dissolves tyre dressings and prepares the surface prior to dressing application.

## FAQ

**Can I use it to clean wheels too?**
Yes, using Q²M TireCleaner on hot wheels can be effective, but it's crucial to avoid applying any product on hot surfaces. The wheels should be cool to the touch before applying Q²M TireCleaner for optimal results and to prevent any adverse effects on the product or the surface.

**Is it safe on rotors and brake calipers?**
Yes, no problem. You can use it to clean suspension parts as well.

# Gyeon Q2M Tire Cleaner 500ml

Brand: GYEON
SKU: 116101

Price: $17.99 AUD (Tax included)

## Description

Gyeon Q²M TireCleaner is a unique formula designed to cleanse all rubber elements of your car. It will soak deep in the porous structure of the material and loosen accumulated dirt and contamination. Q²M TireCleaner dissolves tyre dressings and prepares the surface prior to dressing application.

Gyeon Q²M TireCleaner is completely safe on ceramic coated rims, not interfering with the protective layer or reducing its hydrophobicity. It might be used as a regular, daily wheel cleaner as well.

## Product Features and Benefits

- Effectively removes dirt, grime, and other contaminants from tires
- Safe for use on all types of tires, including white walls
- Non-acidic formula will not damage or harm tires
- Leaves tires looking clean and rejuvenated
- Easy to use and fast acting

The Gyeon Q²M TireCleaner is a powerful and effective cleaner designed specifically for use on tires. It is formulated to quickly and easily remove dirt, grime, and old tire dressing from your tires, leaving them looking like new.

## Specifications

- Consumption: 20ml / tire
- COATING SAFE: YES
- PH LEVEL: 10

## How to Use

### Step 1: Rinse the Tires
Before using Gyeon Q2M Tire Cleaner, rinse the tires thoroughly with water to remove any loose dirt or debris. This will make it easier for the cleaner to penetrate and remove any built-up grime.

### Step 2: Apply Gyeon Q2M Tire Cleaner
Spray Gyeon Q2M Tire Cleaner directly onto the tire surface, making sure to cover the entire area. Let the cleaner sit for 3-5 minutes to allow it to penetrate the grime.

### Step 3: Agitate the Surface
Use a tire brush or sponge to agitate the surface and help loosen any remaining grime. Be sure to scrub the entire surface, including the sidewalls and any grooves or crevices.

### Step 4: Rinse the Tires
Rinse the tires thoroughly with water to remove any remaining cleaner and grime. Be sure to rinse the brush or sponge as well to remove any dirt or debris.

### Step 5: Dry the Tires
Use a microfiber towel to dry the tires and remove any remaining water. This will help prevent water spots and streaks from forming on the surface.

### Step 6: Apply Tire Dressing
After cleaning and drying the tires, you can apply a tire dressing, such as Gyeon Q2 Tire, to give them a shiny, new look. Simply spray the dressing onto the tire surface and use a tire applicator sponge to spread it evenly.
